description_long: This object is a group of four distinct swords and one dagger, each with unique blade shapes and handle designs. The largest sword features a broad, curved blade with engraved patterns and a prominent crossguard, while another sword has a straight, double-edged blade with a simple, dark handle. A third sword is slimmer, with a slightly curved blade and a decorative pommel, and the fourth is a short dagger with a blue-tinted blade and a gold-accented hilt. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the blades and a mix of metal and wood or synthetic materials for the handles, with some ornamental details visible. The color palette includes dark metallic grays, black, blue, and gold, with some reddish-brown accents on the handles. These weapons are visually striking and would stand out in an urban environment, either as display pieces or props.
description: A visually striking group of four swords and one dagger, each with unique blade shapes, ornate handles, and a mix of metallic and colored finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the distinct blade shapes and decorative handles, with the largest sword's curved blade and ornate crossguard most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length and thickness of each blade, with the largest sword's curvature and the dagger's compact size clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view emphasizing the pommels and handle designs, as well as the engraved patterns on the largest sword's blade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the alignment and spacing of the swords and dagger, with the blue-tinted blade of the dagger more visible.
attribute_blade_type: mixed: one broad curved single-edged, two straight double-edged, one slim curved, one short dagger
attribute_handle_design: varied: some contoured with pommels, some straight, materials include wood, metal, and synthetic, with decorative accents
attribute_ornamentation: engraved patterns, gold accents, colored pommels
